evidence.scientific_clarity: Violin+box+jitter overlay clearly shows 4 conditions in correct order (Control→Drug-A 10µM→Drug-A 50µM→Combo) with significance brackets; brief's core requirements fully met.
evidence.typography: PDF uses DejaVu Sans as Type 3 (bitmapped) font — fonttype=42 was NOT set, so text is not selectable/editable; default matplotlib font family retained.
evidence.palette: 4-color categorical palette (#4C72B0, #DD8452, #55A868, #C44E52) is the seaborn default and reasonably CB-safe for deuteranopia, but red (#C44E52) on Combo could conflict with directional convention; no explicit CB check in script.
evidence.layout_density: Figure is 6×4.5 in with tight_layout; bracket stack uses vertical space efficiently; no overlapping labels; y-range computed dynamically to fit brackets.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content and mentions n=100, test type, and significance thresholds; legend is absent (color identity only from x-axis labels), which is acceptable here but no unit on y-axis in caption.
evidence.vector_fidelity: figure.pdf contains Type 3 (bitmapped) DejaVu Sans glyphs — not true vector text; script never sets matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42, so text is not selectable.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (28 KB), figure.png (67 KB), figure.svg (96 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states n=100 per group, describes violin/box/jitter layers, and specifies the statistical test and significance thresholds — a specific, informative description of what the reader sees.

overall_strengths: Complete multi-layer visualization (violin + box + jitter) with significance brackets satisfies all brief requirements and is scientifically clear.
Caption is detailed and quantitative (n=100, Mann-Whitney U, explicit p thresholds), and all required output files are present.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 was never set, so the PDF embeds Type 3 bitmapped DejaVu Sans glyphs — text is not selectable or editable, failing vector fidelity.
Default DejaVu Sans font family retained (no rcParams font override), and the red Combo color risks directional-color confusion in a viability context.
